tasks.subject: Task 1: passwordResetTokens schema + ActivityType additions + migration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the passwordResetTokens table and two new ActivityType enum members to packages/db/src/schema.ts, then generate the corresponding Drizzle migration.

**Verify:** pnpm --filter web exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter web test -- tests/unit/schema-password-reset.test.ts && pnpm --filter @repo/db run db:generate -> tsc clean; vitest passes; db:generate reports one new migration file, no diff to prior ones.

Full code in the plan doc, Task 1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["packages/db/src/schema.ts", "packages/db/migrations", "apps/web/tests/unit/schema-password-reset.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter web exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter web test -- tests/unit/schema-password-reset.test.ts && pnpm --filter @repo/db run db:generate", "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: apps/web/lib/auth/reset-token.ts -- signed jose reset token
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a jose-based signed token primitive carrying a purpose: 'password-reset' claim, with a SHA-256 jti hash for DB lookup, reusing session.ts's exact SignJWT/jwtVerify pattern so a leaked session token cannot be replayed as a reset token.

**Verify:** pnpm --filter web exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter web test -- tests/unit/reset-token.test.ts -> tsc clean; all cases passing.

Full code in the plan doc, Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/web/lib/auth/reset-token.ts", "apps/web/tests/unit/reset-token.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter web exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter web test -- tests/unit/reset-token.test.ts", "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: apps/web/lib/auth/password-reset.ts -- request/confirm orchestration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement requestPasswordReset/confirmPasswordReset, account-enumeration-safe, single-use-token-enforcing, with auto-sign-in on a successful reset.

**IMPORTANT CONTRACT:** confirmPasswordReset never throws for a known failure (bad/garbage/expired/used token) -- it always resolves to { success: true } | { error: string }. Every downstream caller (Task 11's route, Task 12's Server Action) must check this resolved shape, not catch a thrown error.

**Verify:** pnpm --filter web exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter web test -- tests/unit/password-reset.test.ts -> tsc clean; all cases passing.

Full code in the plan doc, Task 3. Imports sendPasswordResetEmail from @repo/email/send (a subpath export -- there is no bare '@repo/email' export), mocked in this task's test and built for real in Tasks 4-8.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/web/lib/auth/password-reset.ts", "apps/web/tests/unit/password-reset.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter web exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter web test -- tests/unit/password-reset.test.ts", "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: packages/email client (lazy Resend client + generic sendEmail)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Flesh out the Phase-2 packages/email placeholder scaffold with real dependencies and a lazy Resend client exposing sendEmail({ to, subject, react }) that throws at call time (not import time) if RESEND_API_KEY/RESEND_FROM_EMAIL are missing.

**Verify:** pnpm --filter @repo/email test -- client -> 5 passed

Full code in the plan doc, Task 4.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["packages/email/package.json", "packages/email/vitest.config.ts", "packages/email/tsconfig.json", "packages/email/src/client.ts", "packages/email/tests/unit/client.test.ts", "pnpm-lock.yaml"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter @repo/email test -- client", "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.description:

tasks.subject: Task 10: POST /api/password-reset/request route handler
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a Zod-validated Route Handler that always responds with an identical generic message regardless of whether the account exists, delegating the actual side effect to requestPasswordReset (Task 3).

**Verify:** pnpm --filter web test -- password-reset-request-route -> 4 passed

Full code in the plan doc, Task 10.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/web/app/api/password-reset/request/route.ts", "apps/web/tests/unit/password-reset-request-route.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter web test -- password-reset-request-route", "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: POST /api/password-reset/confirm route handler
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a Zod-validated Route Handler that confirms a password reset by delegating to confirmPasswordReset, surfacing its resolved error message on failure and a success message otherwise.

**IMPORTANT:** confirmPasswordReset never throws for a known failure -- it always resolves to { success: true } | { error }. This route must check `'error' in outcome` on the resolved value, NOT wrap the call in a try/catch expecting a thrown error (that was a mismatch in an earlier draft, corrected in this plan).

**Verify:** pnpm --filter web test -- password-reset-confirm-route -> 4 passed

Full code in the plan doc, Task 11.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/web/app/api/password-reset/confirm/route.ts", "apps/web/tests/unit/password-reset-confirm-route.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter web test -- password-reset-confirm-route", "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: requestPasswordReset / resetPassword Server Actions
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the same password-reset flow as validatedAction-wrapped Server Actions in app/(login)/actions.ts, matching the file's existing .issues-based error pattern, over the same password-reset.ts logic used by the Route Handlers.

**IMPORTANT:** resetPassword must check confirmPasswordReset's resolved { success: true } | { error } shape (same contract note as Task 11), not a try/catch.

**Verify:** pnpm --filter web test -- password-reset-actions -> 6 passed

Full code in the plan doc, Task 12.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/web/app/(login)/actions.ts", "apps/web/tests/unit/password-reset-actions.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter web test -- password-reset-actions", "modelTier": "standard"}
```
